statement: Day role — Day is not a primary saved entity. It is calculated from task — Timeline helpers, WeeklyView, MonthlyView, DayGridCard, date helpers.
affected_modules: src/types/; src/services/api-mappers.ts; src/utils/date.helpers.ts; src/utils/node.helpers.ts; DTO/domain/builder mapping
ux_impact: Users can view by day without managing days
